commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the Lobster embedded runner to surface missing workflow file path errors for bare workflow-extension inputs and adds regression coverage for missing paths plus inline pipelines with file-like arguments.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +73. Total +74 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source. Current main resolves non-pipe pipeline strings as files before fallback, while the PR returns null before stat for whitespace-containing file paths and then parses the same value as a pipeline.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow PR-branch repair can preserve current existing-file resolution while keeping the new missing-workflow-path behavior.

target.title: fix(lobster): surface workflow path errors
target.body:
## Summary
- repair the existing #68106 branch to rethrow workflow path errors only for bare/path-like workflow file inputs
- preserve inline pipeline execution when arguments contain `.json`, `.yaml`, `.lobster`, absolute paths, URLs, or other slash-containing tokens
- add regression coverage for the missing workflow path and inline-pipeline false-positive cases

## Review blockers to address
- Resolve the Codex review finding on #68106 about extension-only workflow detection breaking valid inline pipelines.
- Keep the fix focused to `extensions/lobster/src/lobster-runner.ts` and `extensions/lobster/src/lobster-runner.test.ts`; remove release-owned `CHANGELOG.md` churn unless the repo release policy explicitly requires it.
- Rebase or refresh against current main before validation.

## Validation
- `pnpm -s vitest run extensions/lobster/src/lobster-runner.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

Fixes #68101.

Credit: based on source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/68106 by @vvitovec, with existing member repair context preserved. Related closed PRs #68132 and #68313 remain useful review context for avoiding inline-pipeline regressions.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156928-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/68106
- Credit: Preserve @vvitovec credit from source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/68106 and existing branch history.; Member repair context from @vincentkoc is already present on #68106 and should remain in the PR history.; If the final repair borrows test cases or heuristic details from closed related PRs #68132 or #68313, credit @nnish16 and/or @1aifanatic in the PR body.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run extensions/lobster/src/lobster-runner.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: source PR #68106 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against 7e1d9e78e73f.
target.author: app/openclaw-clownfish

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
